full_text:
Zhao Tong 趙統
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Tong (趙統). Eldest son of Zhao Yun. Inherited his father’s title. Zhao Tong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
